summary: Productivity PWA with tasks, voice, calendar, journal, analytics, encrypted Safe (passwords, documents, full bank records), and optional group sharing.

categories.title: Tasks & Today
items: Today view with uniform, priority-sized, and masonry layouts
Priorities, tags, categories, recurring and custom schedules
Hold, pause, spillover, dependencies; assign tasks to group members

categories.title: Voice & Smart Hub
items: Create tasks, events, and journal entries by voice
Smart Hub shortcuts and command history

categories.title: Safe — encrypted vault
items: Master password, session timeout, auto-lock
Password entries, secure notes, document vaults
Tags, categories, filters, import/export
Share selected entries; review pending financial imports

categories.title: Bank Records (inside Safe)
items: Deposits, accounts, bills, actions, savings goals
Overview, accounts by bank, timeline, maturity alerts
Multi-currency display and user-set exchange rates
Excel import/export; portfolio and value-over-time charts

categories.title: Groups & sharing
items: Sharing groups with email invitations
Group members and optional finance chat from Safe

categories.title: Calendar & events
items: Birthdays, anniversaries, holidays, recurring events
Rich holiday content; import .ics from Google Calendar

categories.title: Journal
items: Daily entries, mood levels, custom tags
Search, filters, journaling streaks

categories.title: Analytics & insights
items: Completion and time patterns; monthly views
Tag analytics and habit-style tracking

categories.title: Routines & goals
items: Routine templates and custom routines
Resolutions and savings goals alongside financial data

categories.title: Items & quick to-do
items: Gift cards, subscriptions, warranties, milestones
Lightweight to-do list separate from main tasks

categories.title: Focus & time
items: Countdown timer, stopwatch, focus sessions tied to tasks

categories.title: Integrations
items: Google Calendar (.ics), Google Tasks, Apple Reminders, Todoist

categories.title: Themes, avatars & PWA
items: 15 themes; dozens of emoji avatar categories
Install as PWA; mobile layout with bottom navigation
Cloud sync via Supabase when authenticated
